target: 9. Summer Time Rendering
July 24th

(The day after tomorrow.
It's the day of Hitogashima's major event, the Hitogashima Summer Festival.)

(Tourists are flocking in.
People who want to stay and enjoy are coming to the inn where I'm staying, making a complete mess.)

(There's no choice…
I should go somewhere else.)
Welcome!
Hey, Alain.
Oh, Hizuru. You're back again.
Hey, Hizuru~!

Asako?
What happened to Kaori?
Is she working here?

No, no.
She's here to have lunch with Shiori.
Sister, you're here.

Even Ryuunosuke is here.
You're having lunch too?

Yeah.
Kofune's lunch is delicious.
Heh, that's kind of you to say.

Sister, you didn't come to our place after all.
Have you been staying at the inn this whole time?

Yeah, I finally relaxed.
It was a great rest.
Ah, that's why.

Sister, you seem different.
Like the demon that was on you has left.

A demon…?
I guess that's true.

I haven't been thinking about anything like this in a long time.
How many years has it been?

What!?
You didn't think about anything… Hizuru can do that?
Well, even I was surprised.
Ah, Hizuru-chan!

Hey, Hoina.
You took care of me the day before yesterday.
Yeah, I took care of you!

Hey, Hoina.
You shouldn't talk like that.

Hoina-chan!
Something's wrong!
The screen is flashing!

Huh? Really?
Let me see it?

Wait, Hoina!
Don't break your dad's tablet!
…It's lively here.

Sorry, Alain-san.
I made a lot of noise.

It's fine since it's this time.
Lunch is over, and the store is calm now.

Hizuru, what are you going to do?
If you're hungry, I can prepare something.
No, coffee is fine.

Okay.
I'll prepare it right away.

Are you enjoying your vacation?
I heard you're also doing research for your new work.
Is it going well?

I don't know.
Honestly, I haven't figured out the outline for the next work yet…
Well, something will come up.
Mom~, look at this!

Okay, okay.
Then, Hizuru, see you later.
Yeah.
Here's your coffee.
Yeah, thanks.

Alain, it's about time to start preparing for the evening.
Help me.

Well, it's kind of you to say that…
But you should rest a bit more.
You had lunch, so you must be tired.

But tonight is the festival.
It'll get busy, so I think it's better to start early.

I see.
You're probably right.

…Oh!
You're Nagumo-sensei!
You're the one from that time…
I was really surprised back then.
I'm really sorry!

Ah, I didn't do it on purpose!
I think I had a weird dream!

Ah, that's fine.
What surprised me was that you figured out my identity without knowing me.
Huh…?

It's a good opportunity.
Explain why you knew my identity.

My profile is completely private.
Yet, how did you figure out I was 'Ryunosuke Nagumo' just by looking at me?

It's… it's hard to explain…
I don't really know myself…

In my dream…
I felt like I knew the truth.
In a dream…?

Ugh…
I'm not joking, really…
You're not normal…
You're right! I'm sorry.
That's really interesting.
Huh?
Then, tell me in detail!

…I see.
You saw a strange dream with a sense of reality on the ferry.

And it seems that the same dream was also seen by your childhood friend, Ushio…
That's what it is, right?

Yes.
The memories from the dream are already a bit vague.
The fragments I can remember seem so real, it's hard to believe it was a dream.
So, you figured out my identity in that dream?

Maybe…
I don't really know, but both me and Ushio can't remember the specific details…
A premonition dream… or maybe memories…
Memories of parallel worlds…

Hoina!
Return my dad's tablet already!

Just a little longer!
We're taking photos with Shiori right now.
Mom, let's take a photo together!

Okay.
Then, Ryu-kun, come in too.

I don't know…
It might be hard to fit everyone in a self-portrait.

What's wrong?
Are you interested?
No… Hoina…
She's my brother Ryuunosuke's daughter.
That's good…
Good?

It's weird…
Why do I feel that way…

I don't know.
It doesn't seem like you're just saying random things…
To some people, it might sound suspicious.

Heh heh…
Well, that's true.
Sister, don't tease Shinpei too much.

Shinpei is a big fan of 'Ryunosuke Nagumo.'
It's not strange that he found out your identity!

I'm a masked author!
I haven't shown my face anywhere…
Don't make up wild theories and butt in, you idiot!!

Sorry?
Sister, you're tense because you're preparing your new work.
Ah!?
But you know, I'm happy to see a fan in front of me!
W-What!?
New work…? Are you writing it now!?
…Well, yeah.

Wow, that's amazing!
Is it the Saint series!?
Or something else…
How could I tell you that!?
But, well…

I came here for research and a break,
but your story was an unexpected gain.
Tell me more about that story.
Y-Yes!
Hm… I see.

Multiple parallel worlds and their memories…
Yeah, not bad.
But that's still weak.

It's a cliché, after all…
If there was something more… something newer…
Something…?

Yes.
I want an element that makes this story more vivid and standout.
Just one more push…
Why is this sister making such a complicated face?

Hizuru-chan,
you're trying to make an interesting story right now.

A story?
Hm…
If it's a story, I want you to make one about this island.

Ah, that's a good idea!
Hey, Hizuru-chan, did you hear that!?
…What?

If you're going to write a story,
why not make it about this island?
You've gathered so much information about it!
Island information――
Uncertain and incomprehensible, thus a being that shows a new perspective…
Friend… Betrayal…
Hunger… Time reversal…
A warrior fighting in secret…
Child and parent… Light and shadow…
And… Ajiro boy's memories.
Excuse me for a moment…
S, handstand…
Connected!!!
Whoa!?

What's going on?
Shouting all of a sudden…
Connected… Everything is connected!
Interesting idea… Maybe I've had a flash of inspiration…
Here it comes! Here it comes! Here it comes!!

Fuhahaha, it's coming down!!
My victory!!
S, teacher?

Hizuru-chan, you're so happy!
Smiling widely!

Fufu… Ufufu!
My hands can't stop!

Fuhahaha!
Good, good!
I can do it! This can work!

It seems the older sister's switch has been turned on.
Once this happens, there's no stopping it.
So, is a new work going to be made?!
Yes, indeed!

You are the one who gave me the opportunity to create this work!
I'll tell you the title at least!
I just thought of a perfect title for this work!
P-please!!

Listen carefully!
The title of the next work is!
『Summer Time Render』!
KEY TIPS[<color=#GF_KEY_EPILOGIE_HDR>epilogue: Hizuru Minakata</color>] was obtained.
